subject: gir: fellow signatories to the comprehensive settlement - altra

emails.subject: GIR: FELLOW SIGNATORIES TO THE COMPREHENSIVE SETTLEMENT - ALTRA
emails.subject_base: GIR: FELLOW SIGNATORIES TO THE COMPREHENSIVE SETTLEMENT - ALTRA
emails.body: Considering that EnronOnline is more of a "market maker" than a pure trading platform, I don't think they are necessarily the right choice to replace ALTRA, nor do I think they would want to. I just thought I'd point out the need and see if there is anything within our family of companies that might work here. Thoughts? Forwarded by Jeffery Fawcett/ET&S/Enron on 09/12/2000 09:11 AM From: Susan Scott 09/12/2000 08:59 AM

emails.subject: Re: GIR: FELLOW SIGNATORIES TO THE COMPREHENSIVE SETTLEMENT - ALTRA
emails.subject_base: GIR: FELLOW SIGNATORIES TO THE COMPREHENSIVE SETTLEMENT - ALTRA
emails.body: Re: GIR: FELLOW SIGNATORIES TO THE COMPREHENSIVE SETTLEMENT ALTRA Can we talk before you bring it up with SoCal? Very interesting about Herr Cherry. Hadn't heard. I'm coming out soon to see you guys. Jeffery Fawcett@ENRON 09/12/2000 09:15 AM
